description: Inertia.js best practices (Laravel + Vue/React/Svelte adapters): partial reloads, deferred and lazy props, useForm flow, shared data via middleware, prop hygiene, SSR, code splitting, v1 vs v2 and adapter awareness. Includes /inertia:review.
